headline: Why Western Digital (WDC) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
summary: Western Digital (WDC) concluded the recent trading session at $372.52, signifying a +2.99% move from its prior day's close.

headline: Dow jumps 800 points, S&P 500 at new record, Nasdaq gains 6.8% this week
summary: All three of the market indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Friday's session with significant gains, led by the Dow Jones Industrial Average which rose by nearly 868 points (1.79%) in the day. The S&P 500 ended the trading week 4.5% higher while the Nasdaq Composite surged by 6.84%. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre notes the fresh record highs for US stocks.

headline: Sandisk: A Supercycle Is Still A Cycle

summary: STX's strong cash flow fuels debt reduction and growth, but high leverage and a stretched balance sheet continue to pose risks.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader tech sector are trading higher amid overall market strength after Iran opened the Strait of Hormuz for the remainder of the ceasefire following a 10-day armistice between Israel and Lebanon. This alleviates the ongoing supply disruption and lessens energy costs.

headline: These 10 Stocks Rose Over 40% Since Trump's Ceasefire Claims: One Hasn't Done This Since 2005
summary: These stocks won big: AMD logged its longest win streak since 2005. Bloom Energy hit a record high. SanDisk surged 60%.
